docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY NEW, FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, RODNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
